DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFFS NGUEY LAY AND PHYLLIS SCHROBSDORFF'S MOTION TO 1) COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO REQUEST NUMBERS 1 THROUGH 27 OF THE THIRD SETS OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS PROPOUNDED BY PLAINTIFFS TO DEFENDANTS JOHN O'DONOGHUE AND O'DONOGHUE CONSTRUCTION AND 2) FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION IS UNTIMELY GIVEN THE FAILURE TO MOVE TO COMPEL WITHIN 45 DAYS OF THE RESPONSE TO THE INITIAL REQUEST TO PRODUCE THESE DOCUMENTS. SEE NEW ALBERTSON INC. V. SUPERIOR COURT (2008) 168 CAL APP 4TH 1403, 1427-28. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEO M. LAROCCA OF THE NIVEN & SMITH LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 981-5451 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. MELISSA WOOD EISENBERG OF THE MURCHISON & CUMMING LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 365-3170 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFFS NGUEY LAY and PHYLLIS SCHROBSDORFF'S Motion To 1) Compel Further Responses And Production Of Documents In Response To Request Numbers 1 Through 27 Of The Third Sets Of Requests For Production Of Documents Propounded By Plaintiffs To Defendants John O'Donoghue And O'Donoghue Construction And 2) For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants is denied. Plaintiffs' motion is untimely given the failure to move to compel within 45 days of the response to the initial request to produce these documents. see New Albertson Inc. v. Superior Court (2008) 168 Cal App 4th 1403, 1427-28. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
